questions.prompt: Jenny never dares to speak first in front of new classmates. She is very ____.
questions.explain: 題幹說她在新同學面前不敢先開口，表示她很「害羞」，所以選 shy。tidy 是整齊的；national 是國家的；correct 是正確的。

questions.prompt: I will wait here ____ you come back.
The classroom ____ by the students yesterday.
questions.explain: 教室是「被打掃」，要用被動語態 was cleaned。少了 be 動詞是最常見錯誤。

questions.prompt: Kevin’s parents work in another city, so he often feels ____ at night.
questions.explain: 一個人晚上常常感到孤單，應選 lonely。注意 lonely 是情緒上的寂寞，不只是單獨一人。

questions.prompt: Amy can sing very well, and ____ can her sister.
questions.explain: 句首肯定附和要用 so + 助動詞/be動詞 + 主詞，所以是 so can her sister。too 通常放句尾；either / neither 用在否定附和。

questions.prompt: Amy and I only had one umbrella, so we made a ____ to walk home together.
questions.explain: make a deal 表示「講好、一言為定」，最符合情境。row 是排；sight 是景象；grade 是年級或成績。

questions.prompt: Either you or Kevin ____ the key.
questions.explain: either...or... 連接主詞時，動詞看靠近的主詞。Kevin 是單數，所以用 has。

questions.prompt: Both Kevin and his sister ____ at home now.
questions.explain: both A and B 連接兩個主詞時，一律視為複數，所以用 are。

questions.prompt: Taroko is a ____ park in Taiwan, and many people visit it every year.
questions.explain: national park 是固定用法，表示「國家公園」，所以選 national。

questions.prompt: Not only Amy but also her friends ____ here.
questions.explain: not only A but also B 連接主詞時，動詞看靠近的主詞 B。her friends 是複數，所以用 are。
